# Pull Request

## Purpose

What does this change improve?

## Canonical domain

Which domain from [Canonical Taxonomy](../docs/06-canonical-taxonomy.md) does this affect?

- [ ] Service / Customer
- [ ] Stewardship / Resources
- [ ] Cash
- [ ] Margin / Economics
- [ ] Timing
- [ ] Forecasting
- [ ] Inventory / Capacity
- [ ] Operations / Quality
- [ ] Trust / Governance
- [ ] Learning Loop

## Type of change

- [ ] Doctrine
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Operating cadence
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Governance / repo hygiene

## Evidence or rationale

Why is this change useful?

## Mission and stewardship alignment

How does this change support useful service, responsible stewardship, trust, or long-term value?

## Public-safety check

- [ ] No secrets or private business data
- [ ] No confidential names or protected information
- [ ] No legal, tax, investment, accounting, medical, cybersecurity, or financial advice presented as professional counsel
- [ ] No guaranteed-outcome claims
- [ ] Links are relative where possible and verified

## Review notes

What should reviewers pay attention to?
